title: DimStorage
description: DimStorage adds a technologic version of ender chest system with owner, frequency selection and lock system.
body:
DimStorage adds a technologic version of ender chest system with owner, frequency selection and lock system, the DimensionalTank and the DimensionalTablet.

There is a mod configuration file, where you can set the mod according to your game preferences.

I have the owner's license to publish and update this mod. I take this opportunity to thank him for giving me the opportunity to publish it.
